## Summary
<!--
What are we doing and why? 2-3 bullet points: the goal, the motivation, and the approach.
Explain it like you'd explain it to a teammate who wasn't involved — not a list of files.
-->

Closes #
Contributes to #

## What to review
<!--
Point the reviewer at what matters: key files, non-obvious decisions, judgment calls.
Skip anything mechanical.
-->

## Testing
<!--
What changed that needs testing?
How was it tested?
`N/A` if source code was not updated.
-->

## Checklist
- [ ] Acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Flow tests (Maestro) added or updated for any user-facing behavior
- [ ] Migration test written if schema changed
- [ ] CI passing
- [ ] `docs/changelog.md` updated
- [ ] No judgmental language in UI strings
- [ ] No network calls or off-device data transmission introduced
